productName: Indica - Papaya Cake Bubble Hash Banger 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Papaya Cake supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of apricot, tropical, and flowery, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
